_comment: Genesis seeds for the v1.3 EigenTrust-lite scorer. Without at least one seed, the algorithm converges to zero everywhere. The PUBLIC mesh ships with exactly ONE seed — the maintainer-run lighthouse relay — to provide a starting trust gradient without claiming any other peer is pre-trusted. Private swarms override this with their own --genesis-seeds.json. See docs/trust.md.

seeds.note: Maintainer-run public lighthouse / relay. Same peer_id as PublicLighthouse in internal/network/constants.go.
